news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates disclosed defaults on interest and principal for Feb 2026.
Company under insolvency since June 2024; borrowings at INR 55,357 crore.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates disclosed defaults on interest and principal for Feb 2026.
Company under insolvency since June 2024; borrowings at INR 55,357 crore.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd's CoC approved resolutions during the 26th meeting under CIRP.
Key approvals include budgeted cash outflows, a bank guarantee, and extended meeting intervals.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd's CoC approved resolutions during the 26th meeting under CIRP.
Key approvals include budgeted cash outflows, a bank guarantee, and extended meeting intervals.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates posts Q3 net loss of ₹6.9B, better than ₹7.7B YoY.
Q3 revenue declines sharply to ₹7.3B from ₹14.9B YoY.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates posts Q3 net loss of ₹6.9B, better than ₹7.7B YoY.
Q3 revenue declines sharply to ₹7.3B from ₹14.9B YoY.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd updates on its 26th Committee of Creditors meeting held on 12th February 2026.
The company is undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process as per regulatory disclosures.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd updates on its 26th Committee of Creditors meeting held on 12th February 2026.
The company is undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process as per regulatory disclosures.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates disclosed defaults on interest and principal payments for Jan 2026.
The company, with borrowings of ₹55,357 crore, is under insolvency since June 2024.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates disclosed defaults on interest and principal payments for Jan 2026.
The company, with borrowings of ₹55,357 crore, is under insolvency since June 2024.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd has scheduled the 26th Committee of Creditors meeting on 6th Feb 2026.
The meeting follows the company's admission to CIRP under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd has scheduled the 26th Committee of Creditors meeting on 6th Feb 2026.
The meeting follows the company's admission to CIRP under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates' Exec. Dir. Manoj Gaur arrested by ED under PMLA.
Investigation linked to Jaypee Infratech. Gaur granted 14-day interim bail.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates' Exec. Dir. Manoj Gaur arrested by ED under PMLA.
Investigation linked to Jaypee Infratech. Gaur granted 14-day interim bail.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd disclosed defaults on Q4 2025 loan repayments.
Total debt is Rs 55,371.2 cr; insolvency proceedings ongoing since June 2024.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd disclosed defaults on Q4 2025 loan repayments.
Total debt is Rs 55,371.2 cr; insolvency proceedings ongoing since June 2024.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd informed about the 25th CoC meeting held on 12th Dec 2025.
The company is undergoing CIRP as disclosed under SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd informed about the 25th CoC meeting held on 12th Dec 2025.
The company is undergoing CIRP as disclosed under SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

news.title:
Adani has submitted a Rs 15,000 crore resolution plan for Jaiprakash Associates.
The plan awaits approval from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT).
news.summary:
Adani has submitted a Rs 15,000 crore resolution plan for Jaiprakash Associates.
The plan awaits approval from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT).

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates is under insolvency since June 2024 with no current loan defaults.
The company has an outstanding loan of ₹55,371 crore as of Nov 2025 with multiple lenders.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates is under insolvency since June 2024 with no current loan defaults.
The company has an outstanding loan of ₹55,371 crore as of Nov 2025 with multiple lenders.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates' CoC approved Adani Enterprises' resolution plan in CIRP.
NCLT Allahabad received resolution plan approval application on 27th Nov 2025.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates' CoC approved Adani Enterprises' resolution plan in CIRP.
NCLT Allahabad received resolution plan approval application on 27th Nov 2025.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd CoC approved claims list, resolution plan by Adani Enterprises, and distribution terms under CIRP.
E-voting results showed approval rates of 89.9%, 93.8%, and 89.2% for respective agenda items.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd CoC approved claims list, resolution plan by Adani Enterprises, and distribution terms under CIRP.
E-voting results showed approval rates of 89.9%, 93.8%, and 89.2% for respective agenda items.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates' Exec Dir Manoj Gaur arrested by ED on Nov 13, 2025 in money laundering probe.
Jaiprakash under insolvency since June 2024; board powers suspended, managed by Resolution Professional.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates' Exec Dir Manoj Gaur arrested by ED on Nov 13, 2025 in money laundering probe.
Jaiprakash under insolvency since June 2024; board powers suspended, managed by Resolution Professional.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd to hold 24th Committee of Creditors meeting on 14th Nov 2025.
Meeting follows NCLT order under Section 7 of IBC for CIRP admission.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd to hold 24th Committee of Creditors meeting on 14th Nov 2025.
Meeting follows NCLT order under Section 7 of IBC for CIRP admission.

news.title:
Voting is underway on five resolution plans for Jaiprakash Associates.
Adani has proposed a higher upfront payment in its resolution plan.
news.summary:
Voting is underway on five resolution plans for Jaiprakash Associates.
Adani has proposed a higher upfront payment in its resolution plan.

news.title:
Voting on 5 plans for Jaiprakash Associates begins; Vedanta leads in value, Adani offers highest upfront payment.
Vedanta's bid valued at ₹12,505 crore NPV; Adani's at ₹12,050 crore NPV. Other contenders include Dalmia, PNC, Jindal Power.
news.summary:
Voting on 5 plans for Jaiprakash Associates begins; Vedanta leads in value, Adani offers highest upfront payment.
Vedanta's bid valued at ₹12,505 crore NPV; Adani's at ₹12,050 crore NPV. Other contenders include Dalmia, PNC, Jindal Power.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd is under insolvency since June 2024 with Rs 55,371.2 crore debt.
No specific default amount declared; multiple banks and ARCs are lenders.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd is under insolvency since June 2024 with Rs 55,371.2 crore debt.
No specific default amount declared; multiple banks and ARCs are lenders.

news.title:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd undergoing CIRP held its 22nd CoC meeting on 15 Oct 2025.
E-voting on ratifying resolution plan deadline achieved 89.07% approval from CoC.
news.summary:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd undergoing CIRP held its 22nd CoC meeting on 15 Oct 2025.
E-voting on ratifying resolution plan deadline achieved 89.07% approval from CoC.

news.title: India's top conglomerates are vying to acquire bankrupt Jaiprakash Associates.
news.summary: India's top conglomerates are vying to acquire bankrupt Jaiprakash Associates.
